final:
module T_latch (
    input wire T,
    input wire reset,
    input wire EN,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge reset) begin
        if (EN) begin
            if (T) begin
                Q <= ~Q; // Toggle Q if T is high
            end
            // If T is low, Q remains the same
        end
    end
endmodule
